title: Request field removal (BREAKING)
description: The POST /payments endpoint removes the promo_code field from its request body. Clients that currently send promo_code in their payment requests will have that field silently dropped or rejected, depending on server validation strictness. This is a breaking change because callers relying on promotional discounts via this field will lose that functionality without any API-level indication.

api_changes.reason: Removing an optional request field that callers may actively send breaks those callers. The server can no longer accept or process the promo_code value, removing discount functionality for any consumer sending this field.
